message:
Fix query history debouncing (sux.2)

Previously, query history was saved after every debounced search (60ms),
causing typing "foobar" to save "f", "fo", "foo", "foob", "fooba", "foobar"
as 6 separate entries. This polluted the history with partial queries.

Changes:
- Remove auto-save from search execution path (was lines 3382-3389)
- Add save_query_to_history() helper for explicit commit actions
- Save history only when user commits: Enter on result, F8 editor, y copy
- Add dedupe_history_prefixes() to clean up prefix pollution on persist
- Apply deduplication when saving tui_state.json

This is part of the Search UX Overhaul epic (sux.2.1, sux.2.2, sux.2.3).
